title: Shared hashFile() unifies the managed-hash recorder and the drift reader
action: Add hashFile(abs) to templates/lib/fsutil.mjs (+ byte-mirror .bee/bin/lib/fsutil.mjs): read the file as utf8 and return crypto sha256 hex — byte-identical to what both sites do today. Rewire the two FILE-hashing sites: onboard_bee.mjs buildManagedVersions lib+helper hashing (:1840,:1844) import and use hashFile; bee.mjs computeRuntimeDrift (:254) use hashFile. Leave the generic sha256(text) (onboard) and computeManifestHash (bee.mjs) untouched — they hash non-file content. onboard imports from ../templates/lib/fsutil.mjs (matches its ../templates/lib/commands_detect import); bee.mjs adds hashFile to its existing ./lib/fsutil.mjs import. Then regenerate the onboarding ledger (self-onboard --apply) and the release manifest (release_manifest --write) since fsutil bytes changed. Keep templates/lib byte-identical to .bee/bin/lib and templates/bee.mjs to .bee/bin/bee.mjs.

truths: hashFile(abs) is the single function both buildManagedVersions (recorder) and computeRuntimeDrift (reader) use for file hashing
recorded managed-hash VALUES are unchanged vs before (utf8 hashing preserved) — beegog self-onboard reconciles to drift:false
a content-edited managed lib file still reads drift:true; test_bee_cli drift suite green
test_lib fsutil suite green; templates/lib/fsutil.mjs == .bee/bin/lib/fsutil.mjs and templates/bee.mjs == .bee/bin/bee.mjs byte-identical
prohibitions: do not change the hash VALUES (stay utf8) — the ledger must not need a forced rewrite of meaning
do not touch the generic sha256(text)/computeManifestHash (non-file content)
do not let any mirror drift

trace.outcome: Unified the managed-hash recorder (onboard buildManagedVersions) and the drift reader (bee.mjs computeRuntimeDrift) onto a single fsutil.hashFile(abs) — they can no longer disagree about a vendored file's fingerprint (review finding arch P2-1). Values byte-identical (utf8 preserved): beegog reconciled to drift:false with no forced ledger meaning-change. Mirrors intact, verify green.
trace.verify_output: test_lib green; test_bee_cli 129/0 (drift suite incl content-edit=drift:true); test_lib_mirror 15 files identical; beegog reconciled drift:false (recorder==reader, values byte-identical); ledger+manifest regenerated
